tasks.title: Voting section: adapt for Monetarium dual-coin rewards
tasks.description:
Rewrite the inherited dcrdata Voting section on the home page to support Monetarium's dual-coin reward model (MAIN_MANIFEST.md §5.1).

User-visible outcome: the Voting section shows two subsections — "Vote VAR Reward" (per-VAR staking yield for last block / 30 days / year) and "Vote SKA Reward" (per-VAR yield in each SKA token, one block per emitted SKA type, also for last block / 30 days / year).

Hard constraints:
- SKA values must use 18 decimal places; do NOT use float64 for SKA amounts — use the big-number module.
- The number of SKA reward blocks is dynamic: one per emitted SKA type.
- Mobile-first layout, dark theme must be preserved.

tasks.title: Backend: expose Vote VAR Reward and Vote SKA Reward data via API/template context
tasks.description:
Extend the home page handler (cmd/dcrdata/internal/explorer/) to supply the data needed by the Voting section rewrite.

What to deliver:
- `VoteVARReward`: averaged VAR reward per staked VAR coin for last block, 30 days, and 1 year.
- `VoteSKARewards`: slice (one entry per emitted SKA type) each containing SKA-n identifier and reward-per-staked-VAR values for last block, 30 days, and 1 year.
- All SKA amounts must be computed via the big-number module (15 integer + 18 decimal digits).

Done when: the template context struct carries both fields with correct precision and the explorer compiles cleanly.

tasks.title: Frontend: rewrite Voting section template and styles
tasks.description:
Update the home page template (cmd/dcrdata/views/) and SCSS (public/scss/) for the Voting section.

What to change:
- Rename the existing "Vote Reward" subsection to "Vote VAR Reward". VAR values display with 8 decimal places; percentage rows (30 days, year) remain as-is.
- Add a "Vote SKA Reward" subsection. Render one block per SKA type using a Go template range over `VoteSKARewards`. Each block shows three rows: `SKA-n/VAR per last block`, `SKA-n/VAR per 30 days`, `SKA-n/VAR per year` — all with 18 decimal places.

Done when: the section renders correctly with mock data on both light and dark themes at mobile and desktop widths.

tasks.title: Mining section: adapt for Monetarium dual-coin rewards
tasks.description:
Rewrite the inherited dcrdata Mining section on the home page to support Monetarium's dual-coin PoW reward model (MAIN_MANIFEST.md §5.2).

User-visible outcome: the Mining section shows two subsections — "PoW VAR Reward" (VAR amount for the last block, with the difficulty indicator retitled "Next Block VAR Reward Reduction") and "PoW SKA Reward" (one line per emitted SKA type showing SKA-n reward for the last block).

Hard constraints:
- SKA values require 18 decimal places and must use the big-number module.
- Number of SKA rows is dynamic (one per emitted SKA type).
- Mobile-first, dark theme.

tasks.title: Backend: expose PoW VAR Reward and PoW SKA Reward data via API/template context
tasks.description:
Extend the home page handler to supply Mining section data.

What to deliver:
- `PoWVARReward`: VAR reward amount for the most recently mined block (8 decimal places, standard VAR precision).
- `PoWSKARewards`: slice (one entry per emitted SKA type) each containing SKA-n identifier and the SKA reward amount for the last block.
- SKA amounts via big-number module.

Done when: template context struct carries both fields, values match node RPC output, and the explorer compiles cleanly.

tasks.title: Frontend: rewrite Mining section template and styles
tasks.description:
Update the home page template and SCSS for the Mining section.

What to change:
- Rename "POW Reward" subsection to "PoW VAR Reward". Change the green difficulty indicator label to "Next Block VAR Reward Reduction".
- Add "PoW SKA Reward" subsection. Render one line per SKA type via template range over `PoWSKARewards`, formatted as `00.000000000000000000 SKA-n per last block` (18 decimal places).

Done when: both subsections render correctly with mock data on light/dark themes at mobile and desktop widths.

tasks.title: Supply section: replace Distribution with Monetarium coin supply
tasks.description:
Replace the inherited dcrdata Distribution section with a new Supply section (MAIN_MANIFEST.md §5.3).

User-visible outcome: the Supply section shows two subsections — "VAR Coin Supply" (current circulating VAR against the ~47M target) and "SKA Coin Supply" (for each emitted SKA type: In Circulation, Total Issued, Total Burned).

Hard constraints:
- SKA figures use up to 15 integer digits and 18 decimal places — big-number module required.
- Number of SKA blocks is dynamic (one per emitted SKA type).
- Mobile-first, dark theme.

tasks.title: Backend: expose VAR and SKA coin supply data via API/template context
tasks.description:
Extend the home page handler to supply the new Supply section data.

What to deliver:
- `VARCoinSupply`: current circulating VAR amount and the target cap (~47M).
- `SKACoinSupply`: slice (one entry per emitted SKA type) each containing SKA-n identifier, `InCirculation`, `TotalIssued`, and `TotalBurned` — all as big-number values (15 integer + 18 decimal digits).
- Remove or gate any Distribution/legacy supply data that is no longer needed.

Done when: template context struct carries both fields with correct precision, sourced from PostgreSQL/node, and explorer compiles cleanly.

tasks.title: Frontend: replace Distribution section with Supply section in template and styles
tasks.description:
Update the home page template and SCSS to replace the Distribution section with Supply.

What to change:
- Remove the old Distribution section markup entirely.
- Add "VAR Coin Supply" subsection showing circulating VAR with the `(of ~47M)` target label.
- Add "SKA Coin Supply" subsection rendered via template range over `SKACoinSupply`. Each SKA block shows: `In Circulation`, `Total Issued`, `Total Burned` — values formatted to 18 decimal places.
- Section title is "Supply".

Done when: the new section renders correctly with mock data on light/dark themes at mobile and desktop widths, and no Distribution markup remains.
